top_signals.title: Analysis: Chairman Kevin Warsh’s task forces are the key to understanding the new Fed
top_signals.summary: The new leader of the Fed left interest rates alone but made clear how he plans to rewire the central bank.

top_signals.title: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart
top_signals.summary: With President Donald Trump halting his nomination of  U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte is set to take on the role.

top_signals.title: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
top_signals.summary: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin mining economics have ‘worsened’ as BTC trades below production cost
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan's current estimated production cost of bitcoin is about $78,000, while bitcoin is currently trading around $62,500.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Chemicals Maker Ashland Pushed to Sell by Activist Cruiser
top_signals.summary: Cruiser Capital Advisors is pushing Ashland Inc. to sell itself, increasing the pressure on the specialty chemicals company after another activist investor called for a sale earlier this month.

top_signals.title: Nintendo confirms data stolen in WebMD subsidiary cyberattack
top_signals.summary: Nintendo of America has confirmed to BleepingComputer that threat actors stole survey data from the third-party TinyPulse service used internally, but its systems were not compromised. [...]
